name: Go Ace It
short_description: Go-Ace-It is a runner game that challenges your gaming skills as you progress through our level and join the leaderboard. Join us now, and cement your place in GoAceIt!
detailed_description:
Go Ace It

Dodge the blue obstacles as you collect points and reach a score yet unseen. Become the greatest Ace in history!

Roll through different environments as your skills develop. Learn to conquer the unknown and find new ways to tackle the challenges this game provides!

Leaderboard

Once you have mastered your acing skills you will se your position on the leaderboard rise!(TBA) And fear not. This game in NOT pay to win. Your chance of becoming the greatest Acer is equal to everyone else.

Hope to see you on our leaderboard in the near future!

- Go Ace It
